channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Badly fitting water access cover, 4th April
item.description:
It's a bit loose, and when our dog stepped on it, it spun around and his leg went down the hole. No harm done this time, but an accident/trip hazard waiting to happen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th April
item.description:
This is twice in as many months rubbish has been dumped here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Place, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wait button not working, 4th April
item.description:
It's the button opp the optician on Norwood road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on Eynsford Rec dog waste bin. near car park.needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian traffic lights not working at Shaftesbury avenue/Cambridge circus juntion, 4th April
item.description:
The pedestrian lights are constantly set to red. This means that there is a severe build up of pedestrians on the pavement. There is likely to be an accident as people risk crossing the road without proper functioning lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charing Cross Road, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked due to completely overgrown hedge, 4th April
item.description:
Been like it for months half the pavement taken up. Get it cut down
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Wood Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning, 4th April
item.description:
The bin is located along the path next to the horses field it is getting quite close to the woodlands, it has graffiti on it and needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cancelation of keep clear box, 4th April
item.description:
After new road asphalt renewal, the existing keep clear sign (yellow lines) in front of the 348 Queenstown Road building was erased. This is causing distress for residents cars when joining the main traffic on Queenstown road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small piece of graffiti on box, 4th April
item.description:
Seen today, 4th april

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crest View Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Grafitti (1 offensive) on building in Eynsford Recreation ground (aka Petts Wood Recreation ground), 4th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Road sign very dirty, Crofton Lane sign at bottom of the Covert, 4th April
item.description:
Very dirty and makes it difficult to see road name

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Covert, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Table and coat rack on Sudrey Street by 197b, 4th April
item.description:
Reporting table a few weeks ago and it was listed as sorted, but it hasn't been. Now the coat rack has been added as well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudrey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
